payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial lower section of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet with vertical recessed panels and a central seam between doors; scuffed and slightly worn base with a low-sheen finish, edge-cropped in the image and appearing close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).
